_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Chronic Stable Angina: Chronic manifestation of coronary artery disease (CAD) described as retrosternal discomfort (heaviness), brought about or increased with exertion and reduced with rest or nitrates.

clinical_thresholds.note: duration of retrosternal discomfort for Chronic Stable Angina

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment submitted?
Clinical notes and ECG report indicative of procedure?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers with vitals and treatment details submitted?
Was the Detailed discharge summary and treatment details provided including drugs used for thrombolysis (if applicable) submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes not submitted or incomplete, failing to support stable cardiopulmonary status.
ECG report not submitted or does not support stable cardiopulmonary status.
Clinical notes and/or ECG report indicate an unstable cardiopulmonary status or non-cardiac etiology, not matching this package.
Detailed Indoor Case Papers are missing or lack essential vital and treatment details.
Discharge summary is missing or incomplete.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for treatment only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, examination.
additional_information.comorbidity_management: Manage factors potentiating angina: Anaemia, Thyrotoxicosis, Pregnancy, febrile illness, Hypertension, Ventricular hypertrophy, CHF, Tachy or brady-arrhythmia, Drugs: bronchodilators, steroids.
